articles.title: Report: Texas Tech will sue, if Big 12 tries to impose sanctions regarding Brendan Sorsby - NBC Sports
articles.description: At a time when the Big 12 is considering taking action against Texas Tech, if/when quarterback Brendan Sorsby plays in games this season, Texas Tech has a message for its conference.
articles.content:

articles.title: The theory taking the rich by storm: China funds data center haters - NPR
articles.description: Tech millionaires claim China is behind a wave of local opposition to U.S. data centers, while providing little direct evidence.
articles.content:
Speaking at an event titled "Harnessing American Power" last month, Interior Secretary Doug Burgum expressed dismay at what he saw as a new wave of local opposition to data centers in America.
